hooks.command:
echo 'VAULT MODE: Obsidian Mind vault active.
- Entry point: Home.md | Bases: bases/ | Active work: work/active/
- Load obsidian-markdown skill before editing .md files
- Every note needs: date, quarter, description, tags, at least one wikilink
- New work notes → work/active/ | Completed → work/archive/YYYY/ | Incidents → work/incidents/
- People → org/people/ | Brain → brain/ | Reference → reference/
- Use /incident-capture for incidents, /project-archive when completing projects'

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\.md"'; then echo 'Obsidian note check: frontmatter (date, quarter, description, tags), wikilinks to at least one other note, correct folder per CLAUDE.md. Templates folder is excluded from Bases.'; fi

echo 'Session end checklist:
- Archive completed projects? (work/active/ → work/archive/YYYY/)
- Update indexes? (Index.md, Memories.md, People & Context, Brag Doc)
- New notes linked? (orphans are bugs)
- Run /vault-audit if many notes were created/modified'
